# Bank Management System

## How to Run

**Method 1: Double-click**
- Double-click `RUN_APPLICATION.bat`

**Method 2: Command line**
```bash
java -jar BankManagementSystem.jar
```

## Requirements
- Java Runtime Environment (JRE) 17 or higher
- Download Java: https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/

## Demo Login
- **Card Number:** 1234567890123456
- **PIN:** 1234

## Files Included
- `BankManagementSystem.jar` - Main application
- `lib/` - Required libraries (SQLite JDBC, SLF4J)
- `db/` - Database files
- `RUN_APPLICATION.bat` - Quick launcher

## Features
✅ Create new bank accounts
✅ Deposit money
✅ Withdraw money
✅ Fast cash
✅ Balance enquiry
✅ Change PIN
✅ Mini statement with transaction history

## Support
GitHub: https://github.com/Rushi22007/Bank-Management-System-Java
